     the Fermi energy is    -0.4866 ev

!    total energy              =   -6614.63090696 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          8.8E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26666865 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -139240.31711782 Ry
